entries.title: Launched VibeTimeline
entries.description: Built a premium portfolio timeline component blending Git log aesthetics with Scandi minimalism. Featured on Awwwards.

entries.title: Joined Vercel Design Team
entries.description: Leading frontend architecture for the next generation of developer tools. Shipping zero-runtime CSS solutions.

entries.title: Open Source Milestone: 10k Stars
entries.description: Our UI component library reached 10,000 GitHub stars. Grateful to the incredible community of contributors.

entries.title: Spoke at Next.js Conf
entries.description: Presented 'The Art of Invisible Design' to 5,000+ developers. Exploring the intersection of performance and aesthetics.

entries.title: Shipped Design System v3
entries.description: Completely rewrote our design system with React Server Components. 40% reduction in bundle size achieved.

entries.title: Relocated to Stockholm
entries.description: Made the move to Sweden for a fresh perspective. Embracing fika, lagom, and the endless summer sun.

entries.title: Published TypeScript Deep Dive
entries.description: Released a comprehensive course on advanced TypeScript patterns. Over 15,000 developers enrolled in the first month.

entries.title: Founded Studio Null
entries.description: Started a boutique design studio focused on minimalist digital experiences for premium clients worldwide.
